approval.title: An MCP client wants to change your tools

crossClientWarning.before: This change affects every connection in this Space — not just the one requesting it. Other connected clients will see a new toolset on their next

approval.alwaysForSessionTitle: Allow this (client, tool) pair without prompting again until the gateway restarts
approval.manageLink: Don't ask again — manage approval prompts
approval.manageLinkTitle: Deny this request and open the Built-in tab, where you can turn off approval prompts for tool changes

grants.title: Meta-tool auto-approvals

description.before: "Always for this session" approvals granted to clients for specific

grants.empty: No auto-approvals yet. Each dialog defaults to "Allow once".

audit.title: Recent meta-tool activity

description.middle: made by a connected MCP client. Live — last {{count}} entries.

audit.empty: No activity yet. Rows appear as MCP clients call meta tools.
